allow: PowerShell(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio"; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk"; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell($sdkPath = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk"; Get-ChildItem "$sdkPath\\platform-tools" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Host "---"; Get-ChildItem "$sdkPath\\emulator" -Filter "emulator.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Host "---AVDs---"; & "$sdkPath\\emulator\\emulator.exe" -list-avds 2>$null)

PowerShell(where.exe adb 2>$null; if \(-not $?\) { Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools" -Filter "adb.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName })

PowerShell([System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\("JAVA_HOME", "C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr", "User"\); [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "$\([System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\)\);C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr\\bin", "User"\); Write-Host "Done. JAVA_HOME set to: $\([System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('JAVA_HOME','User'\)\)")
PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk"\) { Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk" | Select-Object Name } else { Write-Output "NOT FOUND" })
